mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN GRP_TYPE IS NULL THEN '총 합계' ELSE CASE WHEN CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM IS NULL THEN '합계' ELSE CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM || ' 계약' END END AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , CASE WHEN CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN GRP_TYPE IS NULL THEN '총 집행 금액' ELSE '집행 금액 합계' END ELSE CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM END AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , SUM(PREV_MONTH) AS PREV_MONTH , SUM(CURR_MONTH) AS CURR_MONTH FROM (
SELECT '0' AS GRP_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ , SUM(PREV_MONTH) AS PREV_MONTH , SUM(CURR_MONTH) AS CURR_MONTH FROM ( SELECT '001' AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD , A.CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'PREV_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(B.AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS PREV_MONTH , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(B.AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS CURR_MONTH FROM ( SELECT A.VALUE AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD , B.DESCRIPTION AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , A.DOMAIN_SEQ AS CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ FROM ALNDOMAIN A , L_ALNDOMAIN B WHERE A.ALNDOMAINID = B.OWNERID AND A.DOMAINID = 'CHARGE_TYPE' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , CHARGE_TYPE_CD , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT , CASE WHEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') = BILL_MONTH THEN 'PREV_MONTH' ELSE 'CURR_MONTH' END AS MONTH_TYPE FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL WHERE BILL_MONTH BETWEEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') AND #{BILL_MONTH} AND CONTRACT_TYPE_CD = '001' GROUP BY CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CHARGE_TYPE_CD, BILL_MONTH ) B ON A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD = B.CHARGE_TYPE_CD ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CHARGE_TYPE_CD, CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ))
UNION ALL
SELECT '1' AS GRP_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , CONTRACT_NAME AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , 0 AS CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ , SUM(PREV_MONTH) AS PREV_MONTH , SUM(CURR_MONTH) AS CURR_MONTH FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , CONTRACT_NO , CONTRACT_NAME , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'PREV_MONTH' THEN SUM(AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END AS PREV_MONTH , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN SUM(AMOUNT) ELSE 0 END AS CURR_MONTH FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , A.CONTRACT_NO , B.CONTRACT_NAME , SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT , CASE WHEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') = BILL_MONTH THEN 'PREV_MONTH' ELSE 'CURR_MONTH' END AS MONTH_TYPE FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL A, TB_CONTRACT B WHERE A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD = B.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD AND A.CONTRACT_NO = B.CONTRACT_NO AND BILL_MONTH BETWEEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') AND #{BILL_MONTH} AND A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD <> '001' GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, A.CONTRACT_NO, B.CONTRACT_NAME, A.BILL_MONTH ) GROUP BY CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CONTRACT_NO, CONTRACT_NAME, MONTH_TYPE ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CONTRACT_NAME)) ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((GRP_TYPE, CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM, CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM, CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ), (GRP_TYPE), ()) ORDER BY GRP_TYPE, CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM, CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ

SELECT CASE WHEN GRP_TYPE IS NULL THEN '총 합계' ELSE CASE WHEN CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM IS NULL THEN '합계' ELSE CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM || ' 계약' END END AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , CASE WHEN CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN GRP_TYPE IS NULL THEN '총 집행 금액' ELSE '집행 금액 합계' END ELSE CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM END AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT '0' AS GRP_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT '001' AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD , A.CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ , COALESCE(B.AMOUNT, 0) AS AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT A.VALUE AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD , B.DESCRIPTION AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , A.DOMAIN_SEQ AS CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ FROM ALNDOMAIN A , L_ALNDOMAIN B WHERE A.ALNDOMAINID = B.OWNERID AND A.DOMAINID = 'CHARGE_TYPE' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , CHARGE_TYPE_CD , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL WHERE BILL_MONTH = #{BILL_MONTH} AND CONTRACT_TYPE_CD = '001' GROUP BY CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CHARGE_TYPE_CD, BILL_MONTH ) B ON A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD = B.CHARGE_TYPE_CD ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CHARGE_TYPE_CD, CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ))
UNION ALL
SELECT '1' AS GRP_TYPE , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM , CONTRACT_NAME AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , 0 AS CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ , COALESCE(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) AS AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT AA.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , AA.CONTRACT_NO , AA.CONTRACT_NAME , BB.AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT * FROM TB_CONTRACT WHERE CONTRACT_TYPE_CD <> '001' ) AA, ( SELECT CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , CONTRACT_NO , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , A.CONTRACT_NO , SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL A, TB_CONTRACT B WHERE A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD = B.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD AND A.CONTRACT_NO = B.CONTRACT_NO AND BILL_MONTH = #{BILL_MONTH} AND A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD <> '001' GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, A.CONTRACT_NO, A.BILL_MONTH ) GROUP BY CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CONTRACT_NO ) BB WHERE AA.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD = BB.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD(+) AND AA.CONTRACT_NO = BB.CONTRACT_NO(+) ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((CONTRACT_TYPE_CD, CONTRACT_NAME)) ) GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((GRP_TYPE, CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM, CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM, CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ), (GRP_TYPE), ()) ORDER BY GRP_TYPE, CONTRACT_TYPE_CD_NM, CHARGE_TYPE_SEQ

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT '0' AS GRP_TYPE , A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM IS NULL THEN 'ARC 합계' ELSE A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM END REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM , A.UNITS , A.PREV_MONTH_CNT , A.CURR_MONTH_CNT , SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT , A.REMARK , B.REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ FROM ( SELECT CHARGE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM , UNITS , SUM(PREV_MONTH_CNT) AS PREV_MONTH_CNT , SUM(CURR_MONTH_CNT) AS CURR_MONTH_CNT , SUM(PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT) AS PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT , SUM(CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT) AS CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT , (SUM(CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT) - SUM(PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT)) AS AMOUNT , LISTAGG(REMARK,'') AS REMARK FROM ( SELECT CHARGE_TYPE_CD , REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , UNITS , CNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN REMARK ELSE '' END AS REMARK , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'PREV_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(CNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS PREV_MONTH_CNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(CNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS CURR_MONTH_CNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'PREV_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD , B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , B.UNITS , COUNT(*) AS CNT , LISTAGG(A.REMARK, '
') AS REMARK , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT , CASE WHEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') = BILL_MONTH THEN 'PREV_MONTH' ELSE 'CURR_MONTH' END AS MONTH_TYPE FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL A, TB_BILL_RESOURCE B WHERE A.BASELINE_ID = B.BASELINE_ID AND A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD = '002' AND A.BILL_MONTH BETWEEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') AND #{BILL_MONTH} GROUP BY A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD, B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD, B.UNITS, A.BILL_MONTH ) ) GROUP BY CHARGE_TYPE_CD, REPORT_CATEGORY_CD, UNITS ) A, ( SELECT A.VALUE AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , B.DESCRIPTION AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM , A.DOMAIN_SEQ AS REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ FROM ALNDOMAIN A , L_ALNDOMAIN B WHERE A.ALNDOMAINID = B.OWNERID AND A.DOMAINID = 'REPORT_CATEGORY' ) B WHERE A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD = B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM, A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM, A.UNITS, A.PREV_MONTH_CNT, A.CURR_MONTH_CNT, A.REMARK, REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ), ()) UNION ALL SELECT '1' AS GRP_TYPE , A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM IS NULL THEN 'ARC 합계' ELSE A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM END REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM , A.UNITS , A.PREV_MONTH_CNT , A.CURR_MONTH_CNT , SUM(A.AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT , A.REMARK , B.REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ FROM ( SELECT CHARGE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM , REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM , UNITS , SUM(PREV_MONTH_CNT) AS PREV_MONTH_CNT , SUM(CURR_MONTH_CNT) AS CURR_MONTH_CNT , SUM(PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT) AS PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT , SUM(CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT) AS CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT , (SUM(CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT) - SUM(PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT)) AS AMOUNT , LISTAGG(REMARK,'') AS REMARK FROM ( SELECT CHARGE_TYPE_CD , REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , UNITS , CNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN REMARK ELSE '' END AS REMARK , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'PREV_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(CNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS PREV_MONTH_CNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(CNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS CURR_MONTH_CNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'PREV_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS PREV_MONTH_AMOUNT , CASE WHEN MONTH_TYPE = 'CURR_MONTH' THEN COALESCE(AMOUNT, 0) ELSE 0 END AS CURR_MONTH_AMOUNT FROM ( SELECT A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD , B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , B.UNITS , COUNT(*) AS CNT , LISTAGG(A.REMARK, '
') AS REMARK , SUM(AMOUNT) AS AMOUNT , CASE WHEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') = BILL_MONTH THEN 'PREV_MONTH' ELSE 'CURR_MONTH' END AS MONTH_TYPE FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL A, TB_BILL_RESOURCE B WHERE A.BASELINE_ID = B.BASELINE_ID AND A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD = '003' AND A.BILL_MONTH BETWEEN VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(#{BILL_MONTH}, 'YYYYMM') -1 MONTH), 'YYYYMM') AND #{BILL_MONTH} GROUP BY A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD, B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD, B.UNITS, A.BILL_MONTH ) ) GROUP BY CHARGE_TYPE_CD, REPORT_CATEGORY_CD, UNITS ) A, ( SELECT A.VALUE AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , B.DESCRIPTION AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM , A.DOMAIN_SEQ AS REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ FROM ALNDOMAIN A , L_ALNDOMAIN B WHERE A.ALNDOMAINID = B.OWNERID AND A.DOMAINID = 'REPORT_CATEGORY' ) B WHERE A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD = B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD_NM, A.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD_NM, A.UNITS, A.PREV_MONTH_CNT, A.CURR_MONTH_CNT, A.REMARK, REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ), ()) ) ORDER BY GRP_TYPE, REPORT_CATEGORY_SEQ
